text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest, and I head to the
venue to cheer Sweep Tosho on in her event.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! They're grouping us up by class, so it looks
like we're all on the same team! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yeah! With all our power combined...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's shoot for first! ☆ Ready...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Gooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! That team is so cute! ♪ I'm definitely
rooting for them!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Everyone participating in the
fans-versus-students truck-pulling contest, please
gather up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! With a team like this, there's no way we'll
lose! It doesn't matter how many people are on
the other team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is full of confidence. Considering it's
a team of Umamusume competing against
ordinary fans, I imagine they will win, but...

text_block_list.name: 100 Fans
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: 100 Fans
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, let's go, let's go! This time, we're gonna
win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's fans versus Umamusume! Who will
get their truck to the finish line first this time?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Are they serious with this?! Look how small
all the Umamusume are!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And the trucks are so huge! Can we really feel
good about winning like this?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All right, take your positions! The whistle of fate
is about to sound!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fweet!

text_block_list.name: 100 Fans
text_block_list.text:
Woo! Okay, everyone! Get ready! We pull on
three! One, tw—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: HEEEAAAVE!

text_block_list.name: 100 Fans
text_block_list.text: HUH?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume take the other team by surprise
and heave their truck to the finish in a flash! It's
an incredible victory!

text_block_list.name: 100 Fans
text_block_list.text: Nooo waaaay! How could we lose?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What was that about us being small?
That'll teach you to judge a book by the cover!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's the strong who come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Ouch! Not only is she crazy strong, but she's got a
mouth on her too!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well that's because that's Sweep Tosho! She's
the one who said she'd go from the Yasuda Kinen
to the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Now that you've seen what I can do, I
bet you're thinking I'm the strongest, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Eep! I'm thinking you've got a crazy jump as well...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Your eyes are wide as saucers. Keep them
open and don't take them off me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you something amazing at the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That concludes our exhibition match! Will all the
contestants for the class-versus-class
truck-pulling competition please gather on the
track?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, gotta go!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That was just the exhibition?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. That was nothing compared to what I've
got planned!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time for our class-versus-class
truck-pulling competition! For our first round, we
have the Magical Hero Flower Jets versus the
Helpers!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You better get serious if you want to beat us,
Sweep! The Helpers are the favorites to win the
whole competition!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aha. Right back at ya!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, take your positions. On your marks,
get set...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fweet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep and Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaaah!
Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Fwee-fweeeet! And The Helpers win!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Could both teams please return to their seats?
Next up, the teams for the second round are...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Feels good to sweat!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Look at these biceps, Sweep. They put in
some good work, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...What was that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Again!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! I'm pretty sure the rules don't allow for
that...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Like I care! I don't accept this! I wanna go again!
One more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly lead Sweep Tosho away from the track
as a tantrum starts brewing.

text_block_list.name: Sweep and Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaaah!
Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Fwee-fweeeet! And the Magical Hero Flower Jets win!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
What incredible power and speed! And despite
their huge differences in physique!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! Where does someone so small keep
all that muscle?!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Hey... Sweep Tosho is definitely winning both the
Yasuda Kinen and the Takarazuka Kinen, isn't
she?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ Did you see that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ha, they're getting too worked up. It's not like it
should be any surprise I won.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Still. Guess I may as well take it, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Sweep's making a peace sign! She's so
cute! ☆ I wonder if she's got anyone taking
pictures.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's get a pic with all four of us! I wanna
upload it to Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Good idea! You too, Flower! Hurry up
and get in here!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: C-coming! Whose phone should we use?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
This is Mayano's specialty! She's so good at
taking pictures!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Everyone make a peace sign on three! One,
two, three...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Peace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun tells me later that the photo
was shared all over social media with astounding
speed after she posted it.
